title: FarmersCreate
description: A compatibility mod between Farmer's Delight cutting/cooking recipes and Create
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e2d5ba1a1845151f174591acb0390c3d5cd695.png)

This mod introduces compatibility between Farmer's Delight and Create.

## What works
It automatically adds a _heated mixing recipe_ for every Farmer's Delight cooking pot recipe and a _deployer recipe_ (the deployer needs to have a knife mounted) for every cutting board recipe.

## Supported Farmer's Delight addons
Since the mod dynamically creates recipes on the fly, it should work with any addon. I will note known incompatibilities here if any are found.

![Cutting example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59dcd8acf6b0b5129ef1e4aef9c45f550d3a29a2.png)

![Cooking example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da8f8efb601763a902d67c1983a129cd0233b55.png)

You can find further information on the mods [GitHub](https://github.com/chefexperte/FarmersCreate).
